4:30PM NFL: Bills Vs. Broncos

We have faded the Broncos o lot this season, not
bocause they ore a bad football team, but because their
record and standing hove not consistently lined up with tho
margin in which they beat teams. Denver hos often been
priced os a team expected to seporate comfortably, which
has not alwoys motched reality. This spot is different. As
the Broncos get set to host Buffolo in the divisional round
as a short fovorite, this game becomes for more about
environment, matchup, and contro! than margin. This is the
exact role Denver is butt to handle.

On the road this season, Buffalo’s offense hos not
produced at the some level It dogs at home. They ara
averaging 25 PPG away from home, but that output has
come on weaker efficiency, posting just 6.7 yards per play,
6.1 yards per carry, and 6.6 yords per pass attempt while
completing 67% of their posses. That production now faces
one of the toughest defensive environments they will see. At
home, Denver hos held opponents to only 4.7 yords per
play, 3.9 yords per carry, and §.3 yords per poss attempt,
while limiting quarterbacks to a 55% completion rate and
consistently generating pressure. Buffalo's offensive
numbers are set to deciine in this matchup.

While Denver's offense has been limited in overall
yardage, they have still managed to score consistently at
home, averaging 25.6 PPG in this building. Their mshing
efficiency has been modest, but that becomes for less of
an issue against a Buffalo defense that has struggled on
the road. The Bills are surrendering 5.7 yords per carry
away from home, allowing Denver to stay on schedule and
avoid long-yardoge situations. Buffalo's road defensive
numbers hove been built against a week slate of
opponents, ond now they face a Denver offense posting
stronger passing efficiency, averoging 6.7 yards per pass
attempt with a 62% completion rate, putting Denver's
scoring output In position to rise.

In the first round, Buffalo already showed vulnerability
on the rood, barely surviving despite being gifted turnovers
and getting out-gained in total yardage. If they struggled in
that environment, the task becomes significantly tougher at
Mile High. Denver controls the pace earty, forces Suffato
into inefficient possessions, and leverages the attitude and
crowd ocross four quorters. Buffaio’s season-long profile
has been propped up by one of the weokest schedules in
